content.en:
In the years that followed, Ye Tian's body continued to comprehend the changes of the Endless Dao under the Primal Dao Tree.

His own Dao affinity ability, coupled with the comprehension effect of the Primal Dao Tree, Ye Tian's endless Dao changes were mastered more and more.

Ye Tian's goal is to master the changes of the 300 million Endless Dao, the more he masters, the better, and in the future, he will have greater hope when he hits the Ten Realm-level controllers.

Of course.

Ye Tian also began to collect treasures that helped to open up the Boundary River, but this kind of treasure was very rare, and it was too difficult to collect it.

At the beginning, even the fourth senior sister Snow Girl was in control, and it took a lot of money to bid for two treasures from that auction.

Therefore, whether Ye Tian can get the help of assisting in opening up the boundary river depends on luck.

Time flies, and the Origin Realm Sea ushers in a period of calm, but nothing has happened during this period.

......

Origin Boundary Sea.

Black Emperor Mountain.

At this time, the owner of the Black Emperor Mountain, the Black Emperor Master, was using the cursed black stone to practice.

The power of the Cursed Blackstone is terrifying, and even if a powerful controller touches the Cursed Blackstone, they will be affected by the Cursed Blackstone.

Therefore, the role of the cursed blackstone is basically to refine the cursed weapon, or let the eternal master of the cursed path use it, and understand the changes of the cursed path, and that's it.

But now, the Black Emperor's controller has discovered another effect of the cursed black stone.

That is, to use the cursed black stone to erode his primordial mastery body, and then cooperate with a treasure called the life white stone to heal the control body, when the power of the cursed blackstone and the life white stone converge, the primordial control body will show chains.

These chains are the restraints of the Origin Realm Sea on the body under their control, and they can't be perceived at all in normal times, and if it weren't for an accident, the Black Emperor's controller wouldn't be able to perceive it.

And with each severance of the chains, the Body of Control progresses a little more.

At present, he has cut dozens of chains, but if he wants to cut more planes, he needs a large number of cursed blackstones and life whitestones.

Of course, he was very cautious, he did not buy the cursed blackstone and the life white stone at the same time, but only bought the cursed blackstone in large quantities, and never revealed his identity, although the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce knew his identity, but the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce would not reveal it.

For their credibility, the Black Emperor controller still trusts them very much.

And he rarely buys the Life White Stone, after all, the Life White Stone needs not many of them, mainly to curse the Black Stone.

"Hahaha, no one thought that my Black Emperor would actually open up another path to ascension. Moreover, everyone doesn't know that I have cultivated to the extreme of the Ten Realms level controller, and now I only need to cut some more chains, and I may be able to break the shackles of the Ten Realms level and step into another level, comparable to the Ten Elements Ancestor and the Primordial Ancestor."

The Black Emperor thought excitedly.

Click!

Another chain has been severed by the Black Emperor's master, and he is one step closer to breaking the shackles.

Another period of time passed, and one chain after another was severed.

Finally, after cutting off a total of thirty-six fragments, the shackles in the underworld were completely shattered by the Black Emperor's master, and he broke the limit of the Ten Realm-level controllers and stepped into another level.

However, the Origin Realm Sea Origin in the underworld was still restraining him, suppressing him from breaking through to another realm.

At this time, he was in a very embarrassing realm, obviously surpassing the Ten Realms level controller, but it seemed that he had not reached another realm, as if there was no realm above.

But the Black Emperor Controller didn't care, because he was already comparable to the Ten Elements Ancestor and the Primordial Ancestor.

Rumble!!!!!

The Black Emperor's aura was no longer concealed, the terrifying coercion spread, and the figure of the Black Emperor's controller could be seen in endless time and space.

"Today, I am the !! of the Black Emperor Ancestor"

The Black Emperor Controller, no, the voice of the Black Emperor Ancestor spread throughout the entire Origin Realm Sea.

At this moment, the Origin Realm Sea, countless controllers were shocked.

And some of the controllers who knew the Black Emperor Ancestor were directly dumbfounded, the Black Emperor Ancestor was very low-key, how could he suddenly surpass the Ten Realm-level controllers?

......

"Black Emperor, this guy has surpassed the Ten Realms level, he was obviously not as strong as me before?"

The Black Decay Controller was stunned and a little stunned.

He has always believed that his strength is stronger than that of the Black Emperor's controller, and even not weaker than the original Black Ancestor, and the Black Emperor is undoubtedly much worse.

But now, he is still a Ten Realms-level master, and the Black Emperor has surpassed the Ten Realms-level controllers and become a great existence at the level of the Ten Elements Ancestor with his master.

The Snow Maiden Controller, the Ancient Demon Controller, and the other Ten Realm-level Controllers were all stunned.

There are only dozens of Ten Realm-level masters now, each of whom is very familiar with each other, and the Black Emperor controller suddenly broke through and became a great existence beyond them, and they couldn't react for a while.

Shocked, unexpected, incredible......

"Congratulations!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor appeared.

And the primitive ancestors also appeared.

In addition to them, the Great Luo Heavenly Ancestor, the Realm Ancestor, and another Selfless True Ancestor, the five great beings who currently exist in the Origin Realm Sea that transcend the Ten Realm-level controllers, have appeared one after another, congratulating the Black Emperor.

Soon, the six Great Beings sat together and chatted and discussed.

"Black Emperor, did you break through with the curse black stone?"

Realm Ancestor asked.

"Yes!" the Black Emperor nodded.

I'm afraid that this matter can't be hidden from the Boundary Ancestor, after all, the Boundary Ancestor controls the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce, and he can't hide the fact that he used the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce to buy a large number of cursed black stones.

"It seems that the Black Emperor, you have opened up another path, can you tell me a thing or two? This is also of great use to the entire Origin Realm Sea. Besides, you are the first to open the way, so you will progress quickly, but others will not be able to progress as easily, so you don't have to worry about others overtaking you on your path!" said the Ten Elements Ancestor.

"It's okay to say it, but what's in it for me?"

The Black Emperor Ancestor asked.

"Exchanging cultivation paths and experiences, for example, we are also exploring after surpassing the Ten Realms level, and we have summed up a lot of experience, which can be shared with you, but you must also share your path with us, and we can make progress together, how about it?"

The Black Emperor Ancestor was a little reluctant, but if he didn't say it, these people would not leave easily.

"I'd like to ask you about your strength!"

The Black Emperor Ancestor said.

"Yes, who do you want to fight against?" asked the Ten Elements Ancestor.

"No Self True Ancestor!"

The Black Emperor Ancestor said.

Because the Selfless True Ancestor was the last one to break through among these few, his strength should be the worst.

"Challenge me, it's good, let's go to the end of the world to fight!"

The Selfless True Ancestor proposed.
